title: TEACHING DISCOURSE ANALYSIS AND VOCABULARY
author: Akgyumyush Nasiba Muratovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article briefly explains the procedure of the carried out lesson devoted to explanation of the correlation of Discourse Analysis and vocabulary. The lesson plan and procedure aims both at giving the key notions related to vocabulary in terms of analyzing the discourse as well as attempting to exemplify the procedure of conducting the lesson on the given topic.
steps_raw: This article briefly explains the procedure of the carried out lesson devoted to explanation of the correlation of Discourse Analysis and vocabulary. The lesson plan and procedure aims both at giving the key notions related to vocabulary in terms of analyzing the discourse as well as attempting to exemplify the procedure of conducting the lesson on the given topic.
keywords: discourse analysis, vocabulary, word meaning, idioms, collocations, chunks, lexical set, word family, false friends, cognates.
